name: Automovil Banco Financing
description_short: Columbus-based used car dealership offering in-house auto financing for buyers with bad credit, no credit, or challenged credit histories.
description_long:
Automovil Banco Financing is a used car dealership located at 3865 Sullivant Avenue in Columbus, Ohio, specializing in pre-owned vehicles and corresponding financing solutions. The company positions itself as an accessible option for consumers with non-traditional credit profiles who may struggle to obtain financing through traditional lenders. Their business model combines inventory management of used cars, cargo vans, and trucks with proprietary or partnered financing programs designed to accommodate applicants across various credit scenarios.

The company offers in-house auto financing for vehicle purchases, explicitly marketing to consumers with bad credit, no credit, or challenged credit histories. They maintain an online showroom for inventory browsing, accept online credit applications, and provide multiple contact methods including phone (614-800-1977), in-person visits, and text messaging. Their marketing emphasizes approval likelihood ("Everyone Is Approved") and flexibility across different credit situations. The financing application process appears streamlined, with online application capability and rapid response options.

Automovil Banco Financing distinguishes itself primarily through credit accessibility and a "no credit turn-away" philosophy. Rather than using traditional credit gatekeeping, they claim to evaluate applicants across multiple dimensions and approve most applicants. Their dual focus on inventory variety (daily drivers to luxury vehicles) and flexible financing terms suggests a broader appeal than specialty subprime lenders. The local, physical presence in Columbus with direct phone contact creates a more personal lending experience than purely digital platforms.

A factual assessment reveals this is a niche auto financing provider rather than a broad personal loan lender. Their core product is vehicle-secured lending tied to inventory sales rather than unsecured personal loans. The website lacks specific details about APR ranges, terms, fees, or approval criteria, making it impossible to independently verify claims about approval rates or cost competitiveness. The emphasis on "Everyone Is Approved" marketing language, combined with no transparent pricing, suggests potential for high-cost financing—a common pattern in subprime auto lending markets.
pros: Explicitly welcomes applicants with bad credit, no credit, and challenged credit histories
Online application process enables remote submission without dealership visit requirement
Multiple contact channels: phone, text messaging, email, and in-person appointments
Maintains searchable online inventory with vehicle details and price tracking notifications
Physical location in Columbus allows direct inspection and immediate financing decisions
Marketing suggests flexible approval standards across varied financial situations
Offers both economy vehicles and luxury options to match different budgets and preferences
cons: Website provides no APR ranges, loan terms, or fee structure—preventing cost comparison
"Everyone Is Approved" messaging lacks substantiation and may indicate aggressive subprime lending practices
No transparent credit score requirements or approval criteria disclosed
Financing is vehicle-secured (auto loan) rather than unsecured personal lending despite category placement
Limited customer reviews or third-party rating visibility mentioned on website
best_for: Used car buyers in Columbus, Ohio with limited or poor credit history seeking vehicle financing
Consumers who prefer in-person dealership experience and immediate financing decisions
Applicants wanting flexible approval standards and willingness to work with challenged credit profiles
diagnosis: Automovil Banco Financing is best for Columbus-area used car buyers with poor or nonexistent credit who need immediate vehicle financing and prefer working with a local dealership rather than online lenders. The primary caveat is that this is a subprime auto lender—not a personal loan provider—and the complete absence of pricing transparency on APR, fees, or terms makes cost assessment impossible before application; applicants should obtain detailed term sheets and compare rates with other lenders before committing.
services: Used vehicle sales and inventory management
In-house auto financing for vehicle purchases
Vehicle price drop notifications and alerts
Text message and phone-based customer support
Financing for buyers with bad credit, no credit, and challenged credit histories
